transcript.text:
I am here to advertise a tteokbokki restaurant as a competitor in the same industry
Tteokbok-dang definitely serves tastier tteokbokki
[I will decide after eating]
What would you say about Tteokbok-dang compared to your restaurant (Jeongwon Bunsik)?
Tteokbok-dang VS Jeongwon Bunsik
Hello Everyone, I am here to eat some tteokbokki (spicy rice cake) today
Though I've already tried so many different types of tteokboki, I'm still looking forward to it
Let's go and check it out
It's called Tteokbok-dang. It looks appeti-zang. I am star-vang
They have many different types of food
There are 4 different kinds of tteokbokki
A typical snack bar usually serves frozen mianbao xia (shrimp toast), but this place has homemade one
Please give me all 4 kinds of tteokbokki,
1 order of boneless chicken, 1 order of mianbao xia
Please add jjolmyeon (cold noodle) to the smoky flavored tteokbokki
And I want all of them mild

Ms. Tzuyang, since you are a gourmet, ...
No I'm not.. I'm just a gourmand
I tried every menu at your restaurant a few days ago
Really?
I think the atmosphere was really nice especially for those in their 20s
The atmosphere is definitely different from ours
But, for sure, our foods taste much better! (Dude, she's got 3.5 million subscribers)
I actually enjoyed the meal at Jeongwon Bunsik that day, but, for today, you will enjoy ours more
Bet!
[Homemade mianbao xia (shrimp toast)]
[They prepare them every morning at the restaurant]
[Smoky flavored tteokbokki]
[Jajang Tteokbokki (Rice cake with black bean sauce)]
[Smoky flavored tteokbokki]
Picked radish is pretty good!
[Rosé tteokbokki]

[Cream tteokbokki]
[All 4 kinds!]
Bon Appetit!
Look at this twirling cheese
Considering that this is for 1-2 people, portions are big
They put so much jjolmyeon in it. It looks so tasty
Let's kill the noodles first before it gets soggy
Look at this cheese stretching out
Put a rice cake on top
The smoky flavor just bursts in my mouth
The sauce has a strong smoky flavor and is very thick
[Triple cheese]
It's far from mozzarella cheese
I heard they used a mix of 3 different cheese, and it's really creamy
It tastes sweet at the same time
Also, they put a soft boiled egg in the tteokbokki

I love half-cooked egg
[It became hard because we took too much time filming it]
It looks delicious I think it's my first time eating tteokbokki with half-boiled eggs
Gotta take a big bite
It makes me feel like drinking
Mianbao xia! I really wanted to try this
Without the sauce for the first bite
Yummy
It's full of shrimp meat inside
It's extremely moist
It's super tender inside and very crispy outside
I think it's better than the ones from professional Chinese restaurant
It's so good
Next is jajang tteokbokki (Rice cake with black bean sauce) !
It's been so long since I had it
The last time I had it was couple years ago

I'm very excited
Pop the yolk
I heard the black bean sauce is a smoky flavor as well
Is this a squid?
I think it is
Its taste lies somewhere between that of jajang sauce and jajang ramen. Also, it carries a strong smoky flavor
Next one is the fried chicken
Dip it in the marinated sauce
The freshly fried chicken is always amazing
Very moist inside and crispy outside
Let's try the rose tteokbokki next
Look, it has some pasta noodles
with some bacons too
I'll try the noodles first
It tastes like...
I can slightly taste the smoky flavor as well for this one

It catches the unique greasiness of a typical rose tteokbokki
It's less oily
Rose is my favorite so far
The last one is cream tteokbokki
This one also has noodles in it. It's like carbonara pasta with thick sauce.
It tastes like tteokbokki when I eat the rice cakes but turns into that of pasta when I eat the noodles
I feel like I'm eating 2 different foods from the same plate
Oh actually I am eating 2 different things right now lol
I love it
It literally tastes like carbonara pasta when I'm eating the noodles only
And it tastes like creamy tteokbokki when I'm eating the rice cakes
The jjolmyeons are all soggy
Oh no, it absorbed all the soup
I want my smoky flavored soup
I ordered everything mild, but it's still spicy
[She closes her eyes as usual]

Did I just close my eyes again?
It became my habit now
I have to keep paying attention not to do it
(gotcha)
Again, lol!
This mianbao xia tho... I seriously want to take it to my restaurant and sell it there
(What now lol?)
Yummy
OMG I just made this shirt and wore it for the first time!!!
I literally spill everything every day
[I got you]
[An apron]
You gotta be careful
Thank you! Is this an apron?
Yep, make sure to show our business logo in front
[Such a professional worker]

For sure haha
It's like a Korean seafood black bean noodles platter
It's got seafood and a smoky flavor
So, that makes it Korean seafood black bean-
-tteokbokki
When did they start creating such type of tteokbokki dish?
It's very creamy
The jajang tteokbokki has quite a lot of soup
But that doesn't mean it's bland
Arghh.. the egg is destroyed
I should've eaten it earlier
[Holy Moly]
[She hasn't noticed yet]
(She saw it)
What in the heck... is this????
I even had my apron on!!!!!

(I'm bout to cry)
[She just bought it a few days ago]
[What's wrong?]
(She noticed what happened)
OMG, what the.... did it splatter?
You probably have to make another one
If it was a cream tteokbokki, it would've been unnoticeable because it's white
I can't pay for the cleaning fee
[She walks away]
What am I supposed to do?
It's all messed up already
Done with rose tteokbokki
It's only the soup and vegetables that are left
I ate all the rice cakes
The chicken piece is too big to wrap with cheese
The cheese is all hard now

It's still yummy tho
I saved this mianbao xia earlier
Wow you drank so much soda
Oh wow, you are almost done tho!
You even finished the soup as well
I mean.. hahah pretty much yeah
How was the food overall?
What would you say was the best one among the 4 types of tteokbokki
Rose tteokbokki was the best one when I had the first bite
But, as I kept going, it changed to the spicy flavored tteokbokki
I would just say both of them
I personally want to ask you which place is better, Jeongwon Bunsik or Tteokbok-dang
[I don't even know what to say]
[The right to remain silent]
[Any kind of tteokbokki is tasty in general]
Oh can I get 1 more order of mianbao xia? Actually 2 more please

For to go? Yes please!
Hang tight, we will make you the best one
I think the overall filming went pretty well (She's talking to her boss)
[She's reporting]
Excuse me, chief?
